framework.reasoning: GENERator is a LLaMA decoder-only model released on the HuggingFace Hub (GenerTeam org, e.g. GENERator-eukaryote-1.2b-base) with a standard tokenizer. It loads via AutoModel/AutoModelForCausalLM + AutoTokenizer (no custom triton kernels, unlike DNABERT-2), so the reproduction fine-tunes the official weights. Targeting the paper's real setup (A100), per the requirement. CUDA required (1.2B params). YAML config for per-task hyperparameters.

module_hierarchy.description: Loads official GENERator LLaMA backbone + a classification head on the last-token (<EOS>) embedding, per Appendix C.4.

public_methods.name: from_pretrained
public_methods.signature: from_pretrained(cls, model_name: str, num_classes: int, device: str, load_in_8bit: bool) -> 'GENERatorClassifier'

public_methods.name: forward
public_methods.signature: forward(self, input_ids: torch.Tensor, attention_mask: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor

module_hierarchy.description: Zero-shot variant effect prediction: token->nucleotide marginalization + log-likelihood ratio (Sec 4.5).

public_methods.name: score_variant
public_methods.signature: score_variant(self, seq: str, pos: int, ref: str, alt: str) -> float

module_hierarchy.description: Wrapper over the official GENERator 6-mer tokenizer (AutoTokenizer).

public_methods.name: encode_batch
public_methods.signature: encode_batch(self, seqs: List[str], max_len: int) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]

module_hierarchy.description: Loaders for Genomic Benchmarks (default) + NT tasks + Gener tasks, configurable.
Fine-tuning loop per Appendix C.4 (AdamW betas 0.9/0.95 wd 0.1, reduce-on-plateau + early stopping patience 5, 10-fold CV support).
accuracy, MCC, weighted-F1, AUROC/AUPRC, sequence-recovery accuracy.
YAML loader + seed + benchmark task registry (metric + num_classes per task).

tensor_flows.name: Downstream classification forward
steps: 6-mer tokenize raw DNA -> input_ids [B, L], attention_mask [B, L]
GENERator LLaMA backbone (causal) -> hidden [B, L, D]
take last non-pad token (<EOS>) embedding -> pooled [B, D]  (Appendix C.4)

tensor_flows.name: Zero-shot VEP
steps: place variant site near sequence end; causal next-token prediction over 6-mer vocab
marginalize 6-mer token probs -> per-nucleotide prob at the variant position

entrypoints.purpose: Fine-tune GENERator on a genomic classification task
Evaluate a checkpoint on the test split
Zero-shot variant effect prediction score for a single SNV

risk_assessment.description: GENERator-1B is 1.2B params (~5GB bf16). Full fine-tuning needs an A100-class GPU; will OOM on a 16GB T4.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Target A100 per requirement; expose load_in_8bit + gradient checkpointing + small batch for tighter GPUs.

risk_assessment.description: Per-task optimal LR/BS come from a grid search (Tables S8-S11); a single run must fix one point (SIR conf 0.7).
risk_assessment.mitigation: Default to lr 1e-5 / bs 64 (a frequent optimum); expose in config with # ASSUMED comment.

risk_assessment.description: HF repo id / exact class name for GENERator must be confirmed at load time.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Loader tries AutoModelForCausalLM then AutoModel; hidden size read from config, never hardcoded.

risk_assessment.description: 6-mer tokenizer special-token set not fully enumerated (vocab 4128).
risk_assessment.mitigation: Use the tokenizer bundled with the released weights.
